zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，空头仍占主导
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前维持低位震荡，最新价格运行于8.86附近，24小时跌幅较小，但整体反弹力度有限。价格仍低于SMA20均线8.9165，说明短期趋势偏空，市场情绪仍以谨慎观望为主，短线存在继续试探下方支撑的可能。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值处于负值区域，空头动能尚未完全释放，虽然跌势有所放缓，但尚未形成明确金叉信号。RSI数据暂缺，意味着当前需更多依赖价格结构判断。若后续成交量无法有效放大，反弹空间可能受到明显压制。

关键支撑位关注8.78一线，该位置为日内低点附近，若跌破可能进一步下探8.60区域。上方阻力位则位于8.92至9.00区间，尤其是SMA20附近压力较强，只有重新站稳9美元整数关口，短线趋势才有望逐步转强。

交易策略方面，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，可采取高抛低吸思路。激进交易者可关注8.78附近的支撑反应，若出现放量反弹可轻仓试多；但若价格持续受压于均线之下，则仍建议以逢高减仓、防范进一步回调风险为主。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading in a narrow consolidation range near 8.86 after failing to sustain momentum above the 8.90 area. The slight 24-hour decline reflects cautious sentiment rather than aggressive selling pressure, although price action remains vulnerable while trading below the 20-day moving average at 8.9165. Short-term structure suggests the market is attempting to stabilize after recent weakness, but buyers have not yet shown enough conviction to trigger a meaningful reversal.

The MACD value remains negative at -0.0764, indicating bearish momentum is still present beneath the surface. Although the signal line is unavailable, the current reading implies downward pressure has not fully dissipated. RSI data is unavailable, limiting confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, yet the subdued volatility between 8.7818 and 8.875 suggests indecision among traders. A decisive move outside this range will likely determine the next directional phase for AVAX/USD.

Immediate support is located near 8.78, which aligns with the recent session low and has so far attracted defensive buying. A break below this level could expose the market to further downside toward the 8.60 region. On the upside, resistance appears around 8.92 near the SMA(20), followed by a stronger barrier close to 9.10. Bulls would need a sustained close above these levels to improve short-term sentiment and shift momentum back into positive territory.

For trading strategy, cautious traders may prefer waiting for confirmation before entering new positions. Momentum buyers could look for a breakout above 8.92 with rising volume as an early bullish signal, while short sellers may remain active if price continues rejecting resistance levels. Risk management remains important given the weak momentum backdrop. Tight stop losses below support zones may help reduce exposure in case volatility accelerates unexpectedly.
